steps.title: Apply the temporary-label idea
steps.content: Rivera and Chen argue that invasive and native are temporary labels because climate change can alter species ranges and create suitable habitats in new areas. That means Wisconsin's current label for the walnut twig beetle may not remain appropriate.

steps.title: Avoid claims beyond the text
steps.content: Choice A invents a past Wisconsin population and competition. Choice B says the label is not useful now, but the text says it could be temporary. Choice C predicts establishment even without climate change, which is unsupported. The answer is D.
